response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:23: Identified the intro screen with text 'Takane Lui Birthday Live'. 2. 00:23-05:01: Identified the song 'KING' by Kanaria. 3. Used the search tool to find the lyrics for 'KING Kanaria' to get the original Japanese and English translation. 4. Constructed the JSON based on the identified timestamps and metadata.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a static announcement/countdown screen for Takane Lui's birthday live, followed by a vocal performance of the song 'KING' by Kanaria.

scenes.description: A static announcement screen for 'Luminous Stairs - Takane Lui Birthday Live'. No music is playing.
The song 'KING' by Kanaria begins and plays for the remainder of the video, accompanied by a static image of the performer Takane Lui.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Locking up the clever one before they die
You, hey, you know that it's a pain to get you to be obedient, darling
Don't lock me up! It's not like I knew
Give me a break! You're so cruel

The wishes of the people feel like scraps of irony
Everyone's wishing for the same thing: it's a mechanical
Virgin happy show you want to get in on before everyone else,
Where nobody knows what's going to happen next

I don't have a single brand-new wish:
It's the same as ever, and on top of that, there's no
Warning, warning
I put all my stress

Haha, you are king
You are king

Lo-lo-love, ra-ta-ta
I hate it, I hate it, it's the worst – I burst into tears and I'm down for the count

The same as ever, there's no picked-out
